name: lattice
title: Lattice
description: Fast Raycast capture and manual synthesis for a local context vault.
author: ejohane

commands.name: capture-thought
commands.title: Capture Thought
commands.description: Save a quick note with local context.

commands.name: synthesize-captures
commands.title: Synthesize Captures
commands.description: Manually synthesize captures for a date.

commands.name: open-wiki-proposals
commands.title: Open Wiki Proposals
commands.description: Open proposed wiki updates for review.

preferences.name: projectPath
preferences.title: Project Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the Lattice project folder containing src/cli.ts.

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Vault Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the local vault folder.

preferences.name: bunPath
preferences.title: Bun Path
preferences.description: Path or command name used to run Bun.
